question: What sizes do you offer?
answer: We stock XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL, 2XL and 3XL across most styles. Each product page shows exactly which sizes are available and in stock. If your size shows as out of stock, use the contact form and we'll notify you when it's back.

question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Orders within the Kathmandu Valley are typically delivered within 1–2 business days. Outside the Valley, expect 2–4 business days depending on your location. Our team will call you to confirm your order and coordinate delivery after you place it.

question: How do I track or look up my order?
answer: After placing your order you'll receive an Order ID on the confirmation screen — save it. You can then visit the View Orders page and enter your phone number or Order ID to see your order status at any time.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept cash on delivery (COD), or online/QR payment at the time of delivery — whichever is easiest for you. There are no delivery charges; the price you see is the price you pay. Our team will confirm payment details when they call to confirm your order.

question: Can I exchange or return an item?
answer: Yes. If you receive a wrong or defective item, contact us within 3 days of delivery and we'll arrange an exchange at no cost to you. For size exchanges, reach out via the contact form or call us directly — we'll do our best to help.

question: Do you offer custom or bulk orders?
answer: Absolutely. We work with clubs, schools and corporate teams for custom kit orders with logo printing and personalisation. Drop us a message through the Contact page with your requirements and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

question: How do I care for my jersey or kit?
answer: Machine wash cold (30°C) on a gentle cycle, inside out. Do not bleach, tumble dry, or iron directly on printed areas. Air dry for best results. Proper care keeps colours bright and fabric in top condition for longer.

question: Do you ship outside Nepal?
answer: Currently we deliver within Nepal only. International shipping is on our roadmap — follow us on social media or check back soon for updates.
